programme.desc: S1 , E318 : Samar, a wealthy tycoon, and Swanandi, a young middle-class professional, enter a marriage of convenience. However, their contractual nuptials gradually evolve into a profound connection.

programme.title: Lakshmi Nivas
programme.desc: S1 , E517 : Lakshmi is married to Shriniwas Dalvi, who belongs to a traditional joint family. While she strives to navigate challenges, she supports her husband's dreams.

programme.title: Tula Japnar Aahe
programme.desc: S1 , E449 : Manjiri quickly finds out about Meera's secretive visit to Goddess Nirati. Meanwhile, Meera boldly attempts to convince Atharva that Manjiri is actually an unearthly being.

programme.title: Patanjali Yog - By Yogrishi Swami Ramdev
programme.desc: S1 , E1468 : Baba Ramdev emphasises the importance of yoga and demonstrates various asanas and breathing exercises that enable one to lead a healthy and stress-free life.

programme.title: Joy Baba Lokenath
programme.desc: S1 , E96 : A Bengali spiritual series narrating Baba Lokenath's teachings, miracles, and legacy, inspiring devotees through stories of faith, compassion, and divine guidance.

programme.title: Aankhen
programme.desc: After being sacked from his position as a bank manager, a temperamental man plots revenge by orchestrating a robbery, enlisting three unlikely accomplices.

programme.title: The Shaukeens
programme.desc: Bored with their mundane lives, three 60-something men, immersed in the allure of Mauritius, rekindle their youthful spirits and compete for the attention of a vivacious social media addict, Ahana.

programme.title: Laal Singh Chaddha
programme.desc: Laal Singh Chaddha, a man with a disability, recounts the early years of his life to a passenger on a train. Now, his only wish is to be reunited with his childhood sweetheart, Rupa.

programme.title: Sholay
programme.desc: Jai and Veeru, two ex-convicts, are hired by Thakur Baldev Singh, a retired policeman, to help him nab Gabbar Singh, a notorious dacoit, who has spread havoc in the village of Ramgarh.

programme.title: Desi Boyz
programme.desc: Two desi hunks become high-profile escorts when the economy hits the skids. Money soon pours in, but everything else in their lives starts falling apart.

programme.title: Dil Toh Baccha Hai Ji
programme.desc: Naren Ahuja, Abhay Suri and Milind Kelkar are roommates who embark on a journey to find true love. They find the women of their dreams and try their best to make the women reciprocate their love.

programme.title: Bhoothnath
programme.desc: A rhythmic exchange of silly pranks and shenanigans begins after a young boy and his family move into a house inhabited by a grumpy old ghost.

programme.title: Queen
programme.desc: Rani is devastated after her fiancé leaves her just before the wedding. Undeterred, she decides to go on their honeymoon alone where she gets pulled out of her comfort zone and rediscovers herself.

programme.title: Bawaal
programme.desc: A small-town man falls in love with the prettiest girl in town. However, he ends up marrying her in order to raise his social standing.
